audit_items.proof_trace: ber_strdup() can return NULL on allocation failure but ldif_open_url() uses return value in strchr() and ldap_pvt_hex_unescape() without NULL check. ldap_pvt_hex_unescape() immediately dereferences NULL with *s at L1625.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Memory exhaustion during URL processing causes ber_strdup to fail, returning NULL which triggers segfault when strchr or ldap_pvt_hex_unescape dereferences the NULL pointer.
